title: Fantastic Beasts and Where to Find Them
posterAlt: Fantastic Beasts and Where to Find Them (2016) movie poster
tmdbOverview: In 1926, Newt Scamander arrives at the Magical Congress of the United States of America with a magically expanded briefcase, which houses a number of dangerous creatures and their habitats. When the creatures escape from the briefcase, it sends the American wizarding authorities after Newt, and threatens to strain even further the state of magical and non-magical relations.
synopsis: Fantastic Beasts and Where to Find Them (2016) is a fantasy and adventure film from United Kingdom and United States. It holds a solid 7.2 rating on IMDb. A standout of 2010s cinema, it earns its spot on our lists. It carries a PG-13 certification (US rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
